texto: For if people could see- if women especially could see- what is real and true and how the elegant possession of what is in each of our individual hearts is what matters more than anything.
autor: Kris Radish Annie Freeman's Fabulous Traveling Funeral pg. 297
explicacao: Citação de Kris Radish Annie Freeman's Fabulous Traveling Funeral pg. 297 sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “For if people could see- if women especially could see- what is real and true and how the elegant…” articula amor, verdade, women em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como women.
